remediation: report exact missing, disabled, incompatible, or unverified fact
provision and verify prerequisites without silent installation
degraded-guidance.fallback: review direct-engine commands after prerequisites are satisfied

remediation: request separate authority only when the user chooses mutation
verification-only.fallback: direct verified compatible status or verify operation

remediation: stop and name every failed or unknown guarantee
unsupported.fallback: none until a safe fallback is established

transitions.when: a known prerequisite becomes missing, disabled, incompatible, or unverified while bounded guidance remains safe
create mutation becomes unavailable or unauthorized while verified status/verify authority remains
all requested workflow facts are independently verified and authorized
verified status/verify facts and authority are restored but create mutation is not
create mutation authority and all full-mode facts are separately established
a verified read/evidence prerequisite becomes known unavailable but guidance remains safe
evidence becomes malformed/conflicting or policy denies safe execution/fallback
bounded guidance or safe fallback can no longer be established
evidence becomes malformed/conflicting or evidence authority is denied/unknown
known facts positively establish safe bounded guidance

remediation: provision and verify the plugin snapshot, engine, baseline, compatibility metadata, and trust roots before disconnecting
first-run-offline.fallback: use a separately verified local engine only when its offline inputs are already provisioned

remediation: retain the mutation prohibition and request separate repository authority only if create is chosen
restricted-workspace.fallback: run authorized status or verification through the verified engine or CI

remediation: ask the administrator to review enablement without bypassing policy
plugin-admin-disabled.fallback: use the independently installed verified engine or CI

remediation: install or select a trusted engine as a separate authorized operation, then verify its identity
missing-engine.fallback: review direct-engine installation guidance; no engine result is available

remediation: select a separately trusted compatible engine or compatible plugin without changing repository pins
incompatible-engine.fallback: use a verified compatible direct engine or CI

remediation: retain redacted output for diagnosis and stop until the engine contract is restored
malformed-engine-output.fallback: none until a safe compatible engine response is independently established

remediation: inspect durable engine status and evidence before replaying the same immutable plan
interrupted-operation.fallback: use engine status and documented replay or reconciliation recovery

remediation: inspect status before choosing whether to leave state unchanged or resume with explicit approval
cancelled-operation.fallback: use direct engine status; cancellation grants no later effect authority

remediation: review the retained plan, status, evidence, and recovery action before explicit replay approval
recoverable-operation.fallback: use the engine's documented replay or reconciliation path
